title: Search Optimization: Boolean Search Cache with AST Caching
impact: 40-60% faster repeated boolean queries; Parsed ASTs cached indefinitely

tasks.description: Define BooleanCacheEntry Interface - Create interface with ast (BooleanQueryNode), results (Entity[]), and entityHash (string) fields for tracking result validity
acceptanceCriteria: BooleanCacheEntry interface defined with ast, results, entityHash fields
entityHash used for cache invalidation detection
Interface supports efficient cache lookups

tasks.description: Implement AST Cache - Add private astCache Map<string, BooleanQueryNode> to BooleanSearch, cache parsed ASTs after parsing, normalize query strings before caching (whitespace, operator case)
testCategories: AST cache never expires (query syntax is static)
acceptanceCriteria: astCache: Map<string, BooleanQueryNode> property added
normalizeQuery() method normalizes whitespace and operator case
Parsed AST cached with normalized query as key
Subsequent parses of equivalent queries use cached AST
AST cache has no size limit (queries are small)

tasks.description: Implement Result Cache with Entity Hash - Add resultCache Map, implement computeEntityHash() for fast invalidation detection (based on count + first/last entity names + timestamps), check entityHash before returning cached results
testCategories: Result cache hit when entities unchanged
Result cache miss when entity hash changes
acceptanceCriteria: resultCache: Map<string, BooleanCacheEntry> property added
computeEntityHash() returns string hash of entity state
Hash based on: entity count, first entity name, last entity lastModified
booleanSearch() checks result cache before evaluation
Cache returns results only if entityHash matches
Result cache invalidated when entity hash changes

tasks.description: Add Cache Invalidation Method - Implement invalidateResultCache() to clear result cache (AST cache never cleared), optionally integrate with SearchManager for automatic invalidation
acceptanceCriteria: invalidateResultCache() method implemented
Method clears resultCache but preserves astCache
SearchManager can trigger invalidation after mutations

tasks.description: Add Boolean Cache Tests - Test AST caching, result caching, entity hash invalidation, normalized query matching, and performance improvements
acceptanceCriteria: Test verifies AST cached after first parse
Test verifies 'AND' and 'and' normalized to same cache key
Test verifies repeated query <5ms
Test verifies cache miss after entity mutation
Test verifies entity hash detects changes
10+ new tests added

successCriteria: Boolean query ASTs cached indefinitely after parsing
Normalized queries share same cached AST
Result cache provides 40-60% speedup for repeated queries
Entity hash-based invalidation detects graph changes
All existing boolean search tests pass
notes: Boolean search has two optimization opportunities: AST parsing (done once per unique query syntax) and result evaluation (cached with entity hash for invalidation). The AST cache never expires because query syntax doesn't change. The result cache uses a fast entity hash to detect when cached results are stale without comparing full entity sets.
